_publications._publicationTitle: PET Imaging of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with a Fluorine-18 Labeled Tryptophan Radiotracer.
_publications._context: The triple mutant line from the vendor carries Trp53, Nf1, Suz12 mutations on chromosome 11 and develops tumors at approximately four months, which is similar to conditions found in human NF1 patients
